positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a cosmic forest scene. Silhouetted trees with intricate, organic branch patterns reach towards a swirling nebula sky. The ground is covered in glowing, geometric crystal formations. The overall style is neo-gothic meets psychedelic watercolor, featuring high contrast black silhouettes against deep indigo, emerald green, and gold ethereal gradients. Center composition, perfect for apparel print. Intricate details, strong vector art influence, clean lines, sharp focus, mystical, ambient lighting, ultra-detailed, print-ready.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, logo, watermark, low resolution, noisy, messy, messy lines, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, photo realistic, signature
